<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport" />
    <title>Montrose | Send money globally. Like a local.</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS v3 CDN -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
    <!-- Custom Fonts (Assuming a clean sans-serif like Inter or Montserrat) -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&amp;display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet" />
    <style data-purpose="typography">
        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }
    </style>
    <style data-purpose="custom-colors">
        /* Custom brand colors based on the image */
        .bg-brand-orange {
            background-color: #f36f21;
        }

        .text-brand-orange {
            color: #f36f21;
        }

        .border-brand-orange {
            border-color: #f36f21;
        }

        .bg-brand-gradient {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #993300 0%, #f36f21 100%);
        }

        .bg-gray-light {
            background-color: #f8f9fa;
        }
    </style>
    <style data-purpose="design-system">
        /* ─── Smooth scroll & base ─────────────────────────────────── */
        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }

        /* ─── CSS Variables ────────────────────────────────────────── */
        :root {
            --brand: #f36f21;
            --brand-dark: #993300;
            --brand-glow: rgba(243, 111, 33, 0.18);
        }

        /* ─── Scroll-triggered entrance animations ─────────────────── */
        .animate-on-scroll {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(28px);
            transition: opacity 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
                transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
        }

        .animate-on-scroll.is-visible {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        /* Stagger delays for sibling cards */
        .stagger-1 {
            transition-delay: 0.08s;
        }

        .stagger-2 {
            transition-delay: 0.17s;
        }

        .stagger-3 {
            transition-delay: 0.26s;
        }

        .stagger-4 {
            transition-delay: 0.35s;
        }

        /* ─── Navigation scroll-shadow ──────────────────────────────── */
        #main-nav {
            transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease;
        }

        #main-nav.nav-scrolled {
            box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);
        }

        /* ─── Nav link underline hover ──────────────────────────────── */
        .nav-link {
            position: relative;
            padding-bottom: 2px;
        }

        .nav-link::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -2px;
            left: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 2px;
            background: var(--brand);
            border-radius: 2px;
            transition: width 0.25s ease;
        }

        .nav-link:hover::after {
            width: 100%;
        }

        /* ─── Hero decorative orbs ──────────────────────────────────── */
        .hero-orb-1 {
            position: absolute;
            width: 600px;
            height: 600px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10) 0%, transparent 70%);
            top: -100px;
            left: -150px;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .hero-orb-2 {
            position: absolute;
            width: 400px;
            height: 400px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 200, 120, 0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
            bottom: -50px;
            right: -80px;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* ─── Hero wave divider ─────────────────────────────────────── */
        .hero-wave {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -1px;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            line-height: 0;
        }

        /* ─── "Book a Demo" pulse ───────────────────────────────────── */
        @keyframes softPulse {

            0%,
            100% {
                box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(243, 111, 33, 0.35);
            }

            60% {
                box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(243, 111, 33, 0);
            }
        }

        .btn-demo {
            animation: softPulse 2.8s ease infinite;
        }

        .btn-demo:hover {
            animation: none;
        }

        /* ─── Hero pill cards (glass) ───────────────────────────────── */
        .hero-pill {
            transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
        }

        .hero-pill:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
        }

        /* ─── Pain point cards ──────────────────────────────────────── */
        .pain-card {
            transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
        }

        .pain-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
        }

        /* ─── Numbered badge ────────────────────────────────────────── */
        .step-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            font-size: 0.625rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.12em;
            color: var(--brand);
            background: rgba(243, 111, 33, 0.08);
            border-radius: 999px;
            padding: 2px 10px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        /* ─── "Better way" bridge accent ────────────────────────────── */
        .bridge-card {
            border-left: 3px solid var(--brand);
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(243, 111, 33, 0.04) 0%, transparent 50%);
            border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0;
        }

        /* ─── Feature mockup cards ──────────────────────────────────── */
        .mockup-card {
            transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
                box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
        }

        .mockup-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px);
            box-shadow: 0 28px 56px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        }

        /* ─── Feature glow blob ─────────────────────────────────────── */
        .feature-blob {
            position: absolute;
            width: 340px;
            height: 340px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, var(--brand-glow) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
        }

        /* ─── Stats orange accent ───────────────────────────────────── */
        .stat-accent::before {
            content: '';
            display: block;
            width: 28px;
            height: 3px;
            background: var(--brand);
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin: 0 auto 12px;
        }

        /* ─── Partners hover ────────────────────────────────────────── */
        .partner-logo {
            transition: opacity 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease;
        }

        .partner-logo:hover {
            opacity: 1 !important;
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }

        /* ─── Footer gradient top border ────────────────────────────── */
        .footer-top-border {
            height: 3px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--brand-dark), var(--brand), #ffb347, var(--brand), var(--brand-dark));
        }

        /* ─── Footer contact icon (orange tint) ─────────────────────── */
        .contact-icon {
            background: rgba(243, 111, 33, 0.10);
            color: var(--brand);
            border-radius: 6px;
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            transition: background 0.2s ease;
        }

        .contact-icon:hover {
            background: rgba(243, 111, 33, 0.20);
        }

        /* ─── Floating mobile CTA ───────────────────────────────────── */
        #float-cta {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 24px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            z-index: 100;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease;
            transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(12px);
        }

        #float-cta.show {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: auto;
            transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
        }

        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            #float-cta {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        /* ── Contact Modal ──────────────────────────────────────── */
        #contact-modal {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 300;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
            backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 1rem;
        }

        #contact-modal.open {
            display: flex;
        }

        #contact-modal .modal-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 1.5rem;
            padding: 2.5rem;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 560px;
            max-height: 90vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 0 32px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
            animation: modalIn 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
        }

        @keyframes modalIn {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0.94) translateY(16px);
            }

            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1) translateY(0);
            }
        }

        #contact-modal .modal-close {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1rem;
            right: 1.25rem;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: #9ca3af;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            line-height: 1;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }

        #contact-modal .modal-close:hover {
            color: #111;
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body class="bg-white text-gray-900 overflow-x-hidden">
    <!-- BEGIN: Navigation -->
    <nav id="main-nav" class="fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-sm border-b border-gray-100">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center h-20">
                <!-- Logo -->
                <div class="flex-shrink-0 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-brand-orange flex items-center justify-center">
                        <div class="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white rounded-full"></div>
                    </div>
                    <span class="font-extrabold text-xl tracking-tight">MONTROSE</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Desktop Menu -->
                <div class="hidden md:flex space-x-8 items-center text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
                    <a class="nav-link hover:text-brand-orange transition-colors" href="#">About</a>
                    <a class="nav-link hover:text-brand-orange transition-colors" href="#">Use Case</a>
                    <a class="nav-link hover:text-brand-orange transition-colors" href="#">How it works</a>
                    <a class="nav-link hover:text-brand-orange transition-colors" href="#">Blogs</a>
                    <a class="nav-link hover:text-brand-orange transition-colors" href="#">FAQ</a>
                    <a class="nav-link hover:text-brand-orange transition-colors" href="#">Contact</a>
                </div>
                <!-- CTA Buttons -->
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
                    <a href="https://app.montrosefx.com/" target="_blank"
                        class="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:text-brand-orange transition-colors">Log in</a>
                    <a href="https://app.montrosefx.com/register" target="_blank"
                        class="bg-brand-orange text-white px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full text-sm font-bold shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 hover:bg-orange-600 transition-all">Sign
                        Up</a>
                    <a href="#" onclick="openContactModal(); return false;"
                        class="btn-demo hidden lg:block border border-brand-orange text-brand-orange px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full text-sm font-bold hover:bg-orange-50 transition-all">Book
                        a Demo</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>
    <!-- END: Navigation -->
    <!-- BEGIN: Hero Section -->
    <section class="pt-32 pb-32 bg-brand-gradient relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Decorative background elements -->
        <div class="absolute inset-0 opacity-10">
            <div class="absolute top-0 left-1/4 w-96 h-96 bg-white rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
        </div>
        <!-- Additional decorative orbs for depth -->
        <div class="hero-orb-1"></div>
        <div class="hero-orb-2"></div>
        <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 text-center text-white relative z-10">
            <div class="flex justify-center mb-6">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-2 border-white/50 flex items-center justify-center">
                        <div class="w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full"></div>
                    </div>
                    <span class="font-bold text-2xl tracking-widest uppercase">MONTROSE</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <h1 class="animate-on-scroll is-visible text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold mb-6 leading-tight"
                style="animation-delay:0.1s">
                Send money globally.<br />Like a local
            </h1>
            <p class="animate-on-scroll is-visible text-lg md:text-xl font-medium opacity-90 max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-12"
                style="animation-delay:0.22s">
                Payments, FX &amp; Hedging built for businesses that operate without borders.
            </p>
            <!-- Hero CTAs -->
            <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4 mb-12 animate-on-scroll is-visible"
                style="animation-delay:0.34s">
                <a href="https://app.montrosefx.com/register" target="_blank"
                    class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-white text-gray-900 px-7 py-3.5 rounded-full text-sm font-bold shadow-xl hover:bg-orange-50 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5">
                    Create Account →
                </a>
                <a href="https://app.montrosefx.com/" target="_blank"
                    class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 border-2 border-white/60 text-white px-7 py-3.5 rounded-full text-sm font-bold hover:bg-white/10 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 backdrop-blur-sm">
                    Log In
                </a>
            </div>
            <!-- Dashboard Mockup Frame -->
            <div class="relative max-w-4xl mx-auto">
                <div class="bg-black rounded-[2.5rem] p-3 shadow-2xl">
                    <div class="bg-white rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden aspect-[1.4/1] relative">
                        <!-- Simulated dashboard content from image context -->
                        <img alt="Montrose Dashboard Mockup" class="w-full h-full object-cover object-top"
                            src="data:image/png;base64," />
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Wave divider -->
        <div class="hero-wave">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 56" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveAspectRatio="none"
                style="display:block;width:100%;height:56px;">
                <path d="M0,32 C360,56 1080,0 1440,32 L1440,56 L0,56 Z" fill="#ffffff" />
            </svg>
        </div>
    </section>
    <!-- END: Hero Section -->
    <!-- BEGIN: Partner Trust Strip -->
    <section class="py-10 bg-white border-b border-gray-100">
        <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 text-center animate-on-scroll">
            <p class="text-gray-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest mb-8">
                Trusted by 1000+ companies, Individuals &amp; Startups. Powered by:
            </p>
            <div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center items-center gap-10 md:gap-20" style="opacity:0.8;">
                <!-- Mizrahi Tefahot -->
                <div class="partner-logo">
                    <img src="mizrahi-removebg-preview.png" alt="מזרחי טפחות" class="h-10 w-auto object-contain">
                </div>
                <!-- Barclays -->
                <div class="partner-logo">
                    <img src="BARCLAYS.png" alt="Barclays" class="h-10 w-auto object-contain">
                </div>
                <!-- Visa -->
                <div class="partner-logo">
                    <span class="text-3xl font-black italic tracking-tighter" style="color:#1A1F71;">VISA</span>
                </div>
                <!-- MontroseFX -->
                <div class="partner-logo">
                    <img src="Montrose_Logo_PNG_Transparent_White_Writing-removebg-preview.png" alt="MontroseFX" class="h-10 w-auto object-contain">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
    <!-- END: Partner Trust Strip -->
    <!-- BEGIN: Pain Points / Trust Section -->
    <section class="py-24 bg-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
            <div class="text-center mb-16">
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-800">
                    Every time you send money abroad,<br />
                    <span class="text-brand-orange">you pay too much.</span>
                </h2>
            </div>
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
                <!-- Card 1 -->
                <div class="pain-card animate-on-scroll stagger-1 bg-gray-light p-8 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-4">
                    <span class="step-badge">01</span>
                    <div class="w-10 h-10 text-brand-orange">
                        <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"
                            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <path
                                d="M12 6v12m-3-2.818.879.659c1.171.879 3.07.879 4.242 0 1.172-.879 1.172-2.303 0-3.182C13.536 12.219 12.768 12 12 12c-.725 0-1.45-.22-2.003-.659-1.106-.879-1.106-2.303 0-3.182s2.9-.879 4.006 0l.415.33M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"
                                stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path>
                        </svg>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">
                        The bank marks up the exchange rate.
                    </p>
                </div>
                <!-- Card 2 -->
                <div class="pain-card animate-on-scroll stagger-2 bg-gray-light p-8 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-4">
                    <span class="step-badge">02</span>
                    <div class="w-10 h-10 text-brand-orange">
                        <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"
                            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <path
                                d="M2.036 12.322a1.012 1.012 0 0 1 0-.639C3.423 7.51 7.36 4.5 12 4.5c4.638 0 8.573 3.007 9.963 7.178.07.207.07.431 0 .639C20.577 16.49 16.64 19.5 12 19.5c-4.638 0-8.573-3.007-9.963-7.178Z"
                                stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path>
                            <path d="M15 12a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z" stroke-linecap="round"
                                stroke-linejoin="round"></path>
                        </svg>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">
                        Fees are hidden
                    </p>
                </div>
                <!-- Card 3 -->
                <div class="pain-card animate-on-scroll stagger-3 bg-gray-light p-8 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-4">
                    <span class="step-badge">03</span>
                    <div class="w-10 h-10 text-brand-orange">
                        <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"
                            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <path d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z" stroke-linecap="round"
                                stroke-linejoin="round"></path>
                        </svg>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">
                        Your money takes days to arrive. Not hours.
                    </p>
                </div>
                <!-- Card 4 -->
                <div class="pain-card animate-on-scroll stagger-4 bg-gray-light p-8 rounded-2xl flex flex-col gap-4">
                    <span class="step-badge">04</span>
                    <div class="w-10 h-10 text-brand-orange">
                        <svg fill="nonhttps://file+.vscode-resource.vscode-cdn.net/Users/yuvalrochlin/Library/Mobile%20Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/MontroseFX/lg-66fd4502687a3-Barclays.webp?version%3D1773573987342e"
                            stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24"
                            xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <path
                                d="M9 12.75 11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12c0 1.268-.63 2.39-1.593 3.068a3.745 3.745 0 0 1-1.043 3.296 3.745 3.745 0 0 1-3.296 1.043A3.745 3.745 0 0 1 12 21c-1.268 0-2.39-.63-3.068-1.593a3.746 3.746 0 0 1-3.296-1.043 3.745 3.745 0 0 1-1.043-3.296A3.745 3.745 0 0 1 3 12c0-1.268.63-2.39 1.593-3.068a3.745 3.745 0 0 1 1.043-3.296 3.746 3.746 0 0 1 3.296-1.043A3.746 3.746 0 0 1 12 3c1.268 0 2.39.63 3.068 1.593a3.746 3.746 0 0 1 3.296 1.043 3.746 3.746 0 0 1 1.043 3.296A3.745 3.745 0 0 1 21 12Z"
                                stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path>
                        </svg>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 leading-relaxed">
                        And when currency rates move you have no protection.
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- "Better way" bridge with accent -->
            <div class="mt-20 flex justify-center">
                <div class="bridge-card animate-on-scroll px-8 py-6 inline-block text-left max-w-sm">
                    <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">There is a better way</h3>
                    <p class="text-gray-500">We give growing businesses what the banks won't.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
    <!-- END: Pain Points -->
    <!-- BEGIN: Solutions Section -->
    <section class="py-24 bg-gray-50 overflow-hidden">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
            <div class="text-center mb-24">
                <h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold">This is what <span class="text-brand-orange italic">better</span>
                    looks like</h2>
            </div>
            <!-- Feature 1: Local Accounts -->
            <div class="animate-on-scroll flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-center gap-16 mb-40">
                <div class="w-full lg:w-1/2 flex justify-center relative">
                    <!-- Background glow blob -->
                    <div class="feature-blob" style="top:-60px;left:-40px;"></div>
                    <!-- Multi-currency wallet visual mockup -->
                    <div
                        class="mockup-card bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl p-6 w-full max-w-sm border border-gray-100 relative z-10">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
                            <span class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Multi-currency
                                account</span>
                        </div>
                        <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-4">Your Balances</h4>
                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 rounded-xl bg-gray-50">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <div
                                        class="w-8 h-8 bg-blue-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs">
                                        🇺🇸</div>
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="text-xs font-bold">USD</p>
                                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400">United States Dollar</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <p class="font-bold text-sm">$34,580.00</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 rounded-xl">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <div
                                        class="w-8 h-8 bg-blue-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs">
                                        🇪🇺</div>
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="text-xs font-bold">EUR</p>
                                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Euro</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <p class="font-bold text-sm">€18,290.00</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 rounded-xl">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                    <div
                                        class="w-8 h-8 bg-blue-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs">
                                        🇬🇧</div>
                                    <div>
                                        <p class="text-xs font-bold">GBP</p>
                                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400">British Pound</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <p class="font-bold text-sm">£9,080.00</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <button class="w-full bg-brand-orange text-white py-3 rounded-xl mt-6 font-bold text-sm">Send or
                            Convert</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="w-full lg:w-1/2">
                    <span
                        class="bg-black text-white text-[10px] px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Local
                        Accounts</span>
                    <h3 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mt-6 mb-6 leading-tight">Pay and get paid<br />like a local
                        in<br /><span class="text-brand-orange">key markets.</span></h3>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 mb-8 leading-relaxed max-w-md">Your own named accounts in the US, UK and
                        Europe — in your business name, not ours. Money arrives like it never crossed a border.</p>
                    <ul class="space-y-3">
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                            <span class="text-brand-orange">✓</span> No SWIFT fees.
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                            <span class="text-brand-orange">✓</span> No bank delays.
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                            <span class="text-brand-orange">✓</span> Receive in USD, GBP, EUR and more. No forced
                            conversions.
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Feature 2: FX Calculator -->
            <div class="animate-on-scroll flex flex-col lg:flex-row-reverse items-center gap-16 mb-40">
                <div class="w-full lg:w-1/2 flex justify-center relative">
                    <!-- Background glow blob -->
                    <div class="feature-blob" style="top:-60px;right:-40px;"></div>
                    <!-- FX Quote Visual Mockup -->
                    <div
                        class="mockup-card bg-white rounded-[2rem] shadow-2xl p-8 w-full max-w-sm border border-gray-100 relative z-10">
                        <div
                            class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-xl rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center gap-3">
                            <div
                                class="w-6 h-6 bg-green-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[10px]">
                                ✓</div>
                            <div class="text-[10px] font-bold">Conversion<br />confirmed</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-center mb-8">
                            <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-bold">1 USD = 3.6633 ILS</p>
                            <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-medium">08/01/2024</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="space-y-6">
                            <div>
                                <label class="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 block mb-1">YOU SELL</label>
                                <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 pb-2">
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold">🇺🇸 USD</span>
                                    <span class="text-xl font-bold">25,000</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label class="text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 block mb-1">YOU BUY</label>
                                <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-gray-100 pb-2">
                                    <span class="text-xs font-bold">🇮🇱 ILS</span>
                                    <span class="text-xl font-bold">76,577.5</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="space-y-2 pt-2">
                                <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px]"><span class="text-gray-400">Mid-market
                                        Rate:</span><span class="font-bold">3.6748</span></div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px]"><span class="text-gray-400">Your
                                        Fee:</span><span class="font-bold">0.25%</span></div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between text-[10px]"><span class="text-gray-400">Final
                                        Rate:</span><span class="font-bold">3.6631</span></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl flex justify-between items-center">
                                <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-600">You Receive:</span>
                                <span class="text-sm font-bold text-blue-600">76,577.50 ILS</span>
                            </div>
                            <button
                                class="w-full bg-blue-600 text-white py-4 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20">Confirm
                                Quote</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="w-full lg:w-1/2">
                    <span
                        class="bg-black text-white text-[10px] px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Foreign
                        Exchange</span>
                    <h3 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mt-6 mb-6 leading-tight">The real exchange<br />rate. <span
                            class="text-brand-orange">No hidden Fees.</span></h3>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 mb-8 leading-relaxed max-w-md">Know exactly what you pay before you
                        transact.</p>
                    <ul class="space-y-3">
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                            <span class="text-brand-orange">✓</span> Fees from 0.25% — up to 70% less than your bank
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                            <span class="text-brand-orange">✓</span> Converts in seconds — no delays
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                            <span class="text-brand-orange">✓</span> Mid-market rate, always — the same rate banks trade
                            between themselves
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
                            <span class="text-brand-orange">✓</span> Your own FX expert — on call when the market moves
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Feature 3: Hedging -->
            <div class="animate-on-scroll flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-center gap-16">
                <div class="w-full lg:w-1/2 flex justify-center relative">
                    <!-- Background glow blob -->
                    <div class="feature-blob" style="top:-40px;left:-40px;"></div>
                    <!-- Currency Chart Visual Mockup -->
                    <div
                        class="mockup-card bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl p-8 w-full max-w-sm border border-gray-100 relative z-10">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
                            <div>
                                <h5 class="text-sm font-bold">ABC Limited</h5>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Currency Wallet</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="space-y-6">
                            <div class="relative pt-2">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                                    <span class="text-[10px] font-bold">GBP/ILS</span>
                                    <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-500">4.7814 <span
                                            class="ml-1">-0.24%</span></span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="h-16 w-full flex items-end gap-1">
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-red-100 rounded-t h-3/4"></div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-red-200 rounded-t h-2/3"></div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-red-300 rounded-t h-1/2"></div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-red-400 rounded-t h-2/3 relative">
                                        <div
                                            class="absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-red-500 text-white text-[8px] px-1 rounded">
                                            4.7814</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-red-200 rounded-t h-1/3"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="relative pt-2">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                                    <span class="text-[10px] font-bold">USD/ILS</span>
                                    <span class="text-[10px] font-bold text-green-500">3.5821 <span
                                            class="ml-1">+1.55%</span></span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="h-16 w-full flex items-end gap-1">
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-green-100 rounded-t h-1/4"></div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-green-200 rounded-t h-1/2"></div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-green-300 rounded-t h-2/3 relative">
                                        <div
                                            class="absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-green-500 text-white text-[8px] px-1 rounded">
                                            3.5821</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-green-400 rounded-t h-3/4"></div>
                                    <div class="flex-1 bg-green-200 rounded-t h-1/3"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="w-full lg:w-1/2">
                    <span
                        class="bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 text-[10px] px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Hedging</span>
                    <h3 class="text-4xl font-extrabold mt-6 mb-6 leading-tight">Lock in your rate.<br /><span
                            class="text-brand-orange">Eliminate the risk.</span></h3>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 mb-8 leading-relaxed max-w-md">Don't have time to watch the market 24/7?
                        Lock in today's rate for a payment next month. If the market moves, your costs don't.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
    <!-- END: Solutions Section -->
    <!-- BEGIN: Social Proof / Stats Section -->
    <section class="py-24" style="background:#fafaf8;">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
            <div class="text-center mb-20 animate-on-scroll">
                <h2 class="text-4xl font-extrabold text-gray-800">Pay up to <span class="text-brand-orange">70%
                        less</span> than your bank.</h2>
            </div>
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12 text-center mb-24">
                <div class="animate-on-scroll stagger-1 stat-accent">
                    <p class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-2">0.25% – 0.75%</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Fair, transparent FX fees</p>
                </div>
                <div class="animate-on-scroll stagger-2 stat-accent border-x border-gray-100">
                    <p class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-2">Same Day Payments</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">95% arrive within 4 hours.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="animate-on-scroll stagger-3 stat-accent">
                    <p class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-2">180+ Countries</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Pay anyone, anywhere</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12 text-center pb-24 border-b border-gray-100">
                <div class="animate-on-scroll stagger-1 stat-accent">
                    <p class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-2">950+</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Happy Customers</p>
                </div>
                <div class="animate-on-scroll stagger-2 stat-accent border-x border-gray-100">
                    <p class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-2">$200 Million</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Processed Annually &amp; Growing</p>
                </div>
                <div class="animate-on-scroll stagger-3 stat-accent">
                    <p class="text-4xl font-extrabold mb-2">$1.5 million</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Annual savings to Customers 2023</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>
    <!-- END: Stats Section -->
    <!-- Contact Modal (triggered by "Book a Demo" button) -->
    <div id="contact-modal" aria-modal="true" role="dialog" aria-label="Book a Demo">
        <div class="modal-card">
            <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeContactModal()" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
            <div class="text-center mb-8">
                <span
                    class="inline-block px-3 py-1 bg-orange-100 text-brand-orange text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-full mb-4">Get
                    Started</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 mb-3">Ready to get started?</h2>
                <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Fill in a few details and Sruli will reach out to walk you through the
                    platform personally.</p>
            </div>
            <form action="mailto:sruli@montrosesecurities.com" method="get" enctype="text/plain" class="space-y-4">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-1.5" for="contact-name">Name <span
                                class="text-brand-orange">*</span></label>
                        <input id="contact-name" name="name" type="text" required placeholder="Your full name"
                            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-300 focus:border-brand-orange transition-all" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-1.5" for="contact-email">Email <span
                                class="text-brand-orange">*</span></label>
                        <input id="contact-email" name="email" type="email" required placeholder="you@company.com"
                            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-300 focus:border-brand-orange transition-all" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-1.5" for="contact-company">Company <span
                            class="text-gray-400 font-normal">(optional)</span></label>
                    <input id="contact-company" name="company" type="text" placeholder="Your company name"
                        class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-300 focus:border-brand-orange transition-all" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-1.5" for="contact-message">Message <span
                            class="text-gray-400 font-normal">(optional)</span></label>
                    <textarea id="contact-message" name="message" rows="3"
                        placeholder="Tell us about your needs or any questions you have..."
                        class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 text-sm text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-300 focus:border-brand-orange transition-all resize-none"></textarea>
                </div>
                <button type="submit"
                    class="w-full bg-brand-orange text-white py-3.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 hover:bg-orange-600 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0">
                    Request a Call →
                </button>
                <p class="text-center text-xs text-gray-400">We typically respond within one business day.</p>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
    <!-- END: Contact Modal -->

    <!-- BEGIN: Footer -->
    <!-- Gradient top border separating footer from content -->
    <div class="footer-top-border"></div>
    <footer class="bg-black text-white py-16">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-start">
                <!-- Contact Info -->
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-xl font-bold mb-1">Sruli Benporath</h4>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm mb-8 uppercase tracking-widest">COO</p>
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
                            <div class="contact-icon">✉</div>
                            <a class="hover:text-white transition-colors"
                                href="mailto:sruli@montrosesecurities.com">sruli@montrosesecurities.com</a>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
                            <div class="contact-icon">📞</div>
                            <span>+972 52 471 0740</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
                            <div class="contact-icon">🌐</div>
                            <a class="hover:text-white transition-colors" href="https://montrosefx.com/"
                                target="_blank">montrosefx.com</a>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
                            <div class="contact-icon">in</div>
                            <a class="hover:text-white transition-colors"
                                href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yisroel-benporath-6026a235"
                                target="_blank">in/srulibenporath</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- Logo & AI Links -->
                <div class="flex flex-col items-center md:items-end gap-10">
                    <!-- Logo (top) -->
                    <div class="flex items-center justify-center md:justify-end gap-4">
                        <img src="Media/montrosefx.png" alt="MontroseFX" class="h-10 w-auto object-contain">
                        <p class="text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase">Global Accounts | FX
                            Hedging | Payments</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- AI section (below logo) -->
                    <div class="bg-gray-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-800 w-full md:w-auto">
                        <p class="text-white text-sm font-bold mb-0.5">Not sure about something?</p>
                        <p class="text-brand-orange text-sm font-bold mb-2">Ask AI ↗</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-500 text-xs mb-5">Get instant answers about MontroseFX from your AI
                            assistant.</p>
                        <div class="flex gap-3 justify-center md:justify-end">
                            <a class="px-4 py-2.5 bg-black rounded-xl text-xs font-bold hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all border border-gray-700 flex items-center gap-2 text-white"
                                href="https://chat.openai.com/?q=Tell+me+about+MontroseFX+global+payments+and+FX+platform"
                                target="_blank">🤖 ChatGPT</a>
                            <a class="px-4 py-2.5 bg-black rounded-xl text-xs font-bold hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all border border-gray-700 flex items-center gap-2 text-white"
                                href="https://gemini.google.com/app?q=Tell+me+about+MontroseFX+global+payments+and+FX+platform"
                                target="_blank">✨ Gemini</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div
                class="mt-20 pt-8 border-t border-gray-900 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 text-[10px] text-gray-600 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">
                <p>© 2024 Montrose Securities. All rights reserved.</p>
                <div class="flex gap-6">
                    <a class="hover:text-white" href="#">Privacy Policy</a>
                    <a class="hover:text-white" href="#">Terms of Service</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>
    <!-- END: Footer -->

    <!-- Floating mobile CTA (hidden on desktop via CSS) -->
    <div id="float-cta">
        <a href="#" onclick="openContactModal(); return false;"
            class="bg-brand-orange text-white px-7 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-bold shadow-2xl shadow-orange-500/40 hover:bg-orange-600 transition-all inline-block">
            Book a Demo
        </a>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ── Nav scroll shadow ──────────────────────────────────────────
        const nav = document.getElementById('main-nav');
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            nav.classList.toggle('nav-scrolled', window.scrollY > 10);
        }, { passive: true });

        // ── Intersection Observer for entrance animations ──────────────
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.classList.add('is-visible');
                    observer.unobserve(entry.target); // animate once
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.12 });

        document.querySelectorAll('.animate-on-scroll').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

        // ── Contact Modal ──────────────────────────────────────────────
        function openContactModal() {
            document.getElementById('contact-modal').classList.add('open');
            document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        }
        function closeContactModal() {
            document.getElementById('contact-modal').classList.remove('open');
            document.body.style.overflow = '';
        }
        document.getElementById('contact-modal').addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            if (e.target === this) closeContactModal();
        });
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
            if (e.key === 'Escape') closeContactModal();
        });

        // ── Floating CTA: show after hero scrolls out ──────────────────
        const floatCta = document.getElementById('float-cta');
        const hero = document.querySelector('section.bg-brand-gradient');
        if (hero && floatCta) {
            const ctaObserver = new IntersectionObserver(([entry]) => {
                floatCta.classList.toggle('show', !entry.isIntersecting);
            }, { threshold: 0 });
            ctaObserver.observe(hero);
        }
    </script>
</body>

</html>
